name: Keysight Technologies, Inc.

latest_note.title: FY2025 10-K Analysis
latest_note.title_th: การวิเคราะห์รายงานประจำปี FY2025
latest_note.summary: [Financial Performance] Keysight Technologies delivered revenue of $5.38B in FY2025, a recovery of +8.0% from FY2024's $4.98B trough (which itself declined 8.8% from FY2023's $5.46B peak). The FY2024…

top_risks: Keysight faces a multifaceted risk profile dominated by macroeconomic sensitivity and international operational challenges
The company's global footprint exposes it to economic volatility, geopolitical tensions, and complex regulatory environments across multiple jurisdictions

While Keysight employs mitigation strategies including a resilient business model, diversified operations, and compliance programs, its performance remains vulnerable to external factors beyond its control, particularly given its dependence on technology innovation cycles and competitive markets
one_liner: Keysight Technologies delivered revenue of $5.38B in FY2025, a recovery of +8.0% from FY2024's $4.98B trough (which itself declined 8.8% from FY2023's $5.46B peak).
